popularStory.headline: John Sutton, 3rd Baron Dudley
popularStory.description:
Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron Dudley
•Born: 1495, Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales
•Marriage: Cicely Grey about 1520
•Died: 18 Apr 1553, Westminster, London, Middlesex, England at age 58
•Buried: 18 Sep 1553 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley於1460年1月30日出生在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利杜德利 卡素時，他的父親Sir Edmund Sutton35歲，母親Lady Joyce Tibetot30歲。他於大約1480年與Cecily Willoughby在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾杜德利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他於1525年被列為chamberlain to princess mary (later queen mary i)。他去世於1531年1月31日在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利享年71歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾杜德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley于1460年1月30日出生在英国武斯特斯爾杜德利杜德利 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Edmund Sutton35岁，母亲Lady Joyce Tibetot30岁。他于大约1480年与Cecily Willoughby在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾杜德利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他于1525年被列为chamberlain to princess mary (later queen mary i)。他去世于1531年1月31日在英国武斯特斯爾杜德利享年71岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾杜德利。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley was born on 30 January 1460, in Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, his father, Sir Edmund Sutton, was 35 and his mother, Lady Joyce Tibetot, was 30. He married Cecily Willoughby about 1480, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 9 daughters. In 1525, his occupation is listed as chamberlain to princess mary (later queen mary i). He died on 31 January 1531, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Dudley, Staffordshire, England.

fr.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley est né le 30 janvier 1460, à Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund Sutton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Joyce Tibetot, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Cecily Willoughby environ 1480, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 9 filles. En 1525, sa profession de son indiquée est chamberlain to princess mary (later queen mary i). Il est décédé le 31 janvier 1531, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley am 30. Januar 1460 in Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund Sutton 35 und seine Mutter Lady Joyce Tibetot 30. Er hat um 1480 in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Cecily Willoughby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 9 Töchter. 1525 ist sein Beruf als chamberlain to princess mary (later queen mary i) aufgeführt. Er starb am 31. Januar 1531 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Dudley, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Dudley, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley è nato il il 30 gennaio 1460 nel Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Edmund Sutton, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joyce Tibetot, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Cecily Willoughby circa 1480, nel Dudley, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 9 figlie. Nel 1525, la sua occupazione è indicata come chamberlain to princess mary (later queen mary i). Morì il 31 gennaio 1531, nel Dudley, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Dudley, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudleyが1460年1月30日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーダドリー カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Suttonは35歳，母Lady Joyce Tibetotは30歳であった。約1480年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーでCecily Willoughbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。1525年，職業はchamberlain to princess mary (later queen mary i)と記録されている。彼は1531年1月31日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーで71歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley(이)가 1460년 1월 30일 영국 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund Sutton(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joyce Tibetot(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리에서 Cecily Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1525년, 그의 직업은 chamberlain to princess mary (later queen mary i)이었다. 그는 1531년 1월 31일 영국 워스스터실르 드들리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 드들리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley nasceu em 30 de janeiro de 1460, em Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmund Sutton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joyce Tibetot, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily Willoughby aproximadamente 1480, em Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 9 filhas. Em 1525, sua profissão aparece como chamberlain to princess mary (later queen mary i). Ele faleceu em 31 de janeiro de 1531, em Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley родился 30 января 1460 г. в местности дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund Sutton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joyce Tibetot, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily Willoughby около 1480 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 9 дочерей. В 1525 году он работал по профессии chamberlain to princess mary (later queen mary i). Он умер 31 января 1531 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley nació el 30 de enero de 1460, en Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edmund Sutton, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Joyce Tibetot, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Cecily Willoughby aproximadamente 1480, en Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 9 hijas. En 1525, su ocupación registrada era chamberlain to princess mary (later queen mary i). Murió el 31 de enero de 1531, en Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
